verdict: Seeds 3-7 replication best arm is high_21_25_cap96: 358431 decisions (-13.20% vs same-seed baseline), but cap64/cap80/cap96/cap112 all land in a tight 12.30-13.20% improvement band. The robust result is pure high-cluster priority on bit24; cap96 is a slight default, not a sharp optimum. Next gate: test transfer of the high actual_p1_a_57 cap64/cap96 pattern to another coherent actual-register hotspot candidate.
